attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_KEY                                        
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
      ,NATL.SS_CODE
      ,NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY           
      ,Cast ( NROL.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
      ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT       
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
      RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'   THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
      ,NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE  DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             
      ,NROL.GL_POSTED_DT                  
      ,NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
      ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
       ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
      ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT'  THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
      ,NROL.TRX_SRC_CD AS SOURCE_CODE 
      ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
      ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
      ,'ERP_ADJ'   AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
      ,NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
      ,Coalesce(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,Coalesce(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,Coalesce(NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,NROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD   AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
      , -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
      ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
     ,-7777 AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      ,73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
      , 'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
      ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
      ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
      ,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
      ,NROL.SS_CD
      ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
      ,Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
      ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
      ,'ERP_ADJ' AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
      ,-999  AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
      ,-999 RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY 
      ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PARENT_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
      ,Coalesce (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY, -999) AS DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
      , Cast(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('CSPP_ERP_ADJ') THEN 'CSPP_ADJ' WHEN  NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ') THEN 'VIP_ADJ' ELSE 'CPI_ADJ' END  AS ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
     -- ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(27,12)) AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE
   ,NROL.POB_TYPE_CD
   ,NROL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL
   ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
   AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
   
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
      ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
      AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
	  AND NATL.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
	  AND NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY >0
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
      ON NROL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
      ON NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
      ON   NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
      WHERE /*NROL. ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'  AND*/ EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21='ERP' AND NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ', 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ','CPI_ERP_ADJ')
	   AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
	   AND ( NROL.GL_POSTED_DT IS NULL OR NROL.GL_POSTED_DT  = '3500-01-01') /*MR*/
	   AND  (NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT)
      IN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
          ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE Upper(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO NRS TRANSITION','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
      WHERE NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ', 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ','CPI_ERP_ADJ')
      AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
      AND ACCT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
   AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT DV_AR_TRX_DT FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_DF_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE  ) /*MR*/
    OR (AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 )    )      GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
   -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_KEY                                        
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
      ,NATL.SS_CODE
      ,NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY           
      ,Cast ( NROL.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
      ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT       
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
      RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'   THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
      ,NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE  DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             
      ,NROL.GL_POSTED_DT                  
      ,NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
      ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
       ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
      ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT'  THEN Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - Coalesce(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
      ,NROL.TRX_SRC_CD AS SOURCE_CODE 
      ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
      ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
      ,'ERP_ADJ'   AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
      ,NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
      ,Coalesce(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,Coalesce(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,Coalesce(NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
      ,NROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD   AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
      , -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
      ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
     ,-7777 AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      ,73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
      , 'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
      ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
      ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
      ,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
      ,NROL.SS_CD
      ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
      ,Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
      ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
      ,'ERP_ADJ' AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
      ,-999  AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
      ,-999 RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY 
      ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PARENT_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
      ,Coalesce (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY, -999) AS DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
      , Cast(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('CSPP_ERP_ADJ') THEN 'CSPP_ADJ' WHEN  NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ') THEN 'VIP_ADJ' ELSE 'CPI_ADJ' END  AS ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
     -- ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(27,12)) AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE
   ,NROL.POB_TYPE_CD
   ,NROL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL
   ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
   AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
   
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
      ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
      AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
      INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
      ON NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
	  AND NATL.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
	  AND NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY <0
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
      ON NROL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
      AND NAT.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
	  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
      ON NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
      ON   NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
      WHERE /*NROL. ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'  AND*/ EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21='ERP' AND NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ', 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ','CPI_ERP_ADJ')
	    AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
	     AND ( NROL.GL_POSTED_DT IS NULL OR NROL.GL_POSTED_DT  = '3500-01-01') /*MR*/
	   AND  (NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT)
      IN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
          ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE Upper(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO NRS TRANSITION','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
      WHERE NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_ERP_ADJ', 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ','CPI_ERP_ADJ')
      AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
      AND ACCT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
       AND ( NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT <= (SELECT DV_AR_TRX_DT FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_DF_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE  ) /*MR*/
    OR (AR_TRX_LINE_KEY < 0 )    )      GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
      -7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_KEY                                        
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
      ,'CG' as SS_CODE
      ,NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY           
      ,CAST ( NROL.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
      ,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT                      
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
      RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'  THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
      ,NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE  DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE              
      ,NROL.GL_POSTED_DT                  
      ,NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
      ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
       ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
      ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT'  THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
      ,NROL.TRX_SRC_CD AS SOURCE_CODE 
      ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
      ,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
      ,'ERP_ADJ'   AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
      ,-7777 AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
      ,-999 AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      ,-999 AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      ,-999 AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
      ,NROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD   AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
      , -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
      ,-9999 AS SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
     ,-7777 AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
      ,73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
      , 'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
      ,'-999' AS  BK_COMPANY_CODE  
      ,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
      ,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
      ,NROL.SS_CD
      ,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
      ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
      ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
      ,'ERP_ADJ' AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
      ,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
      ,-999  AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
      ,-999 RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY 
      ,-9999 AS PARENT_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
       ,COALESCE (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY, -999) AS DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
    ,COALESCE(NROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT, -999 ) AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
      ,CASE WHEN NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('CSPP_POS_ADJ') THEN 'CSPP_ADJ' WHEN  NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_POS_ADJ') THEN 'VIP_ADJ' ELSE 'CPI_ADJ' END  as ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
   -- ,CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(27,12)) AS TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE
   ,NROL.POB_TYPE_CD
   ,NROL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
         INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL
     ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
      AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
      ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
      AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
      ON NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
      ON   NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
      INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
      WHERE /*NROL. ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'      AND*/ EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21='POS' AND  NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_POS_ADJ', 'CSPP_POS_ADJ','CPI_POS_ADJ')
       AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
	     AND ( NROL.GL_POSTED_DT IS NULL OR NROL.GL_POSTED_DT  = '3500-01-01') /*MR*/
	   AND  (NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT) 
      IN (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT
      FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
          ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO NRS TRANSITION','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
      WHERE NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_POS_ADJ', 'CSPP_POS_ADJ','CPI_POS_ADJ')
      AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
      AND ACCT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'    
      GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
-7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,NROL.AR_TRX_KEY                                        
,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
,'CG' SS_CODE
,NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY           
,Cast ( NROL.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT       
,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'   THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
,NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE  DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             
,NROL.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
 ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT'  THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
,NROL.TRX_SRC_CD AS SOURCE_CODE 
,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,'ERP_ADJ'   AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,COALESCE(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD   AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
, -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
,-7777 AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, 'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,NROL.SS_CD
,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,'ERP_ADJ' AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
,-999  AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,-999 RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY 
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PARENT_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
,COALESCE (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY, -999) AS DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
, CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)  AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
,CASE WHEN NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('CSPP_XAAS_ADJ') THEN 'CSPP_ANNUITY_ADJ' 
 WHEN  NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ') THEN 'VIP_ANNUITY_ADJ' ELSE 'CPI_ADJ' 
 END  AS ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD
,NROL.POB_TYPE_CD
,NROL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL
 ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
 AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
 ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
 AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 AND NATL.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON NROL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 AND NAT.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
 ON NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
 ON   NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
 ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 WHERE EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21='XAAS' AND NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' 
 AND ( NROL.GL_POSTED_DT IS NULL OR NROL.GL_POSTED_DT  = '3500-01-01') /*MR*/
 AND  (NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT) IN 
 (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
 ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE Upper(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO NRS TRANSITION','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
 WHERE NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
 AND NROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT<0  /*agannava: TnC+POS Changes*/
 AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
 AND ACCT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
 GROUP BY 1)

SELECT 
-7777  AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,NROL.AR_TRX_KEY                                        
,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
,'CG' SS_CODE
,NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY           
,Cast ( NROL.GL_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) GL_DT
,RFD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT       
,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='CREDIT' THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END
RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_CRDT_AMT
,CASE WHEN NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE ='DEBIT'   THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_FNCTNL_DEBIT_AMT
,NROL.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE  DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE             
,NROL.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,NROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE                     
 ,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='DEBIT' THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000   END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_DEBIT_AMT
,CASE WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE ='CREDIT'  THEN COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.0000000) - COALESCE(NROL.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.0000000) ELSE 0.0000000  END RU_REV_TRNSFR_TRXNL_CRDT_AMT
,NROL.TRX_SRC_CD AS SOURCE_CODE 
,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,'ERP_ADJ'   AS TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,NROL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,COALESCE(NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD   AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE 
, -7777 AS AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
,-7777 AS SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, 'UNKNOWN' AS SOURCE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID
,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,-999 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,NROL.SS_CD
,NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,'ERP_ADJ' AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
,-999  AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,-999 RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY 
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PARENT_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
,COALESCE (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY, -999) AS DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
,NROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT  AS  POS_TRX_ID_INT
,CASE WHEN NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('CSPP_XAAS_ADJ') THEN 'CSPP_ANNUITY_ADJ' 
 WHEN  NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ') THEN 'VIP_ANNUITY_ADJ' ELSE 'CPI_ADJ' 
 END  AS ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD 
,NROL.POB_TYPE_CD
,NROL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL
 ON NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
 AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.APPLICATION_ID
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD 
 ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE
 AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE<=0 
 INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
 AND NATL.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON NROL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 AND NAT.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA    
 ON NROL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
 ON   NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
 ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NROL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 
 WHERE EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21='XAAS' AND NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
AND ( NROL.GL_POSTED_DT IS NULL OR NROL.GL_POSTED_DT  = '3500-01-01') /*MR*/
 AND NROL.ACCT_CLASS_CD='REVENUE' AND  (NROL.SK_TRX_ID_INT) IN 
 (SELECT SK_TRX_ID_INT FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
 ON NROL.GL_DT = RFD.CALENDAR_DATE AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE Upper(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES','CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO NRS TRANSITION','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  AND LANG = 'US')
 WHERE NROL.TRX_SRC_CD IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
 AND NROL.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT>0  /*agannava: TnC+POS Changes*/
 AND RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE <=1
 AND ACCT_CLASS_CD='UNEARNED_REVENUE'
 GROUP BY 1)
